positive: A whimsical, stylized celestial map print depicting interconnected constellations, lunar phases, and mythological sea creatures swimming amongst nebula clouds. The style is a blend of Art Deco illustration and vintage scientific engraving, using deep indigo blues, shimmering gold leaf accents, vibrant turquoise, and touches of cosmic magenta. The central composition features a prominent, stylized crescent moon above stylized, symmetrical representations of sea life (octopus tentacles, dolphin silhouettes, jellyfish blooms) framed by elegant, swirling stellar lines. The design must have clean, thick outlines, strong contrast between the dark background and the luminous elements, and be perfectly optimized for seamless repetition on apparel. Minimal gradient use, favoring solid, impactful color blocks and sharp details.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, messy, blur, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, cropped, jpeg artifacts, lowres, gradient, grainy
